overview: A cinematic Free Fire-inspired game companion app with character rosters, weapon database, battle tips, epic background music, and stunning visual effects — built for mobile gamers.
features: Cinematic home screen with animated particles and looping epic BGM
Full character roster with abilities, stats, and favorites
Complete weapon database with stat bars and tier badges
Battle tips and pro gamer strategies
Fire/glow animations and goosebumps visual effects
